audience_policies.source_phrase: Pass admits 6 people at $9.00 for adults and $6.00 for children. Under age 2 years admitted free. Visit Zoo New England website for hours, updates. This pass can't be used for Stone Zoo "Zoolights" or Franklin Park Zoo "Boston Lights".
